# Stella

> Open source legal workspace. Documents, matters, and research — powered by AI.

Stella is a legal workspace built for mid-size law firms (5–50 lawyers). Core document management features are free forever. AI-powered review, research, and drafting are usage-based.

## Key facts

- Open source (AGPL-3.0)
- Built in the EU (stella labs, s.r.o., Czech Republic)
- Self-hostable or cloud-hosted
- AI outputs are grounded by citations
- No per-seat pricing, no feature gates on core DMS

## Links

- Website: https://stll.app
- Application: https://app.stll.app
- Source code: https://github.com/stella/stella
- Documentation: https://docs.stll.app
- Status: https://status.stll.app

## Tech stack

- Frontend: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS 4
- Backend: Elysia (Bun runtime)
- Database: PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
- AI: Vercel AI SDK + Google Generative AI
- Auth: better-auth

## Company
